JOOLA

JOOLA Collin Johns Scorpeus Pro IV

Widebody profile for quick hands, blocks, resets, and kitchen exchanges.

A forgiving Scorpeus-style paddle for doubles players who value blocks, counters, and fast NVZ exchanges over maximum reach.

TypeHands-speed
Shapewidebody
CorePolymer honeycomb, 14/16mm options
FaceCarbon Friction Surface / TechFlex Power style platform

Play profile

Power8.0
Control8.8
Spin8.5
Forgiveness8.8
Hand speed8.4

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.

How the Collin Johns Scorpeus Pro IV plays

The JOOLA Collin Johns Scorpeus Pro IV is a quick-hands paddle built for the kitchen. On our 0–10 comparison scale its strongest traits are control and forgiveness. Its widebody shape gives a large, forgiving sweet spot that is easy to control. It comes in both 14 mm and 16 mm, so you can pick pop or control.

It is aimed at 3.0–4.5 players, and it is forgiving enough for improvers still grooving their swing. It favours touch over raw put-away power. It sits in the premium price tier — confirm the current price at the source before buying. It is part of the Collin Johns signature line.
